known_gaps: Generic I2C sensor plus connector PCB realization now has regression coverage for promoted VCC/GND/SDA/SCL inter-block route candidates and contact evidence, but routed same-net completion and KiCad DRC evidence are still in progress.
Promotion route_completion and kicad_checks gates are expected to block until routed same-net completion and real ERC/DRC report artifacts are available.
Routing is intentionally skipped so the fixture documents the current connectivity/layout blocker before broader sensor breakout layout proof.
notes: Tracks the richer sensor breakout scenario that should eventually graduate into a default KiCad-backed design example.
